'''Gryphon''' was a [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Design an Alien" /> located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]],<ref name="Atlas" /> where war among its clans had long been a way of life. During the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the native [[Brock Lar]] had been the highest-ranking warrior in his clan, but after the death of his youngest son, he realized that there was no hope for peace. Around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he chose to escape the clutches of death and seek out a peaceful world where his family could begin a new life. The people of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] listened to Brock’s story and welcomed his family with open arms.<ref name="Design an Alien" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gryphon was created by [[Matthew Berry]] and [[Craig Farr]], two ''[[Star Wars]]'' fans, for the backstory of their [[Brock Lar]] entry in the [[Design An Alien]] contest held in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]s''.
